zh.app.title: TigerMemory
zh.brand.name: TigerMemory
zh.brand.tagline: 你的 AI 第二大脑
zh.brand.subtitle: 个人记忆控制台
zh.page.start.title: TigerMemory 开始
zh.page.daily.title: TigerMemory 今日待确认
zh.page.health.title: TigerMemory 运行检查
zh.page.quality.title: TigerMemory 记忆质量
zh.page.settings.title: TigerMemory 偏好设置
zh.page.canvas.title: TigerMemory 项目进展
zh.page.self_evolution.title: TigerMemory 自我进化
zh.page.start.intro: 按步骤完成普通版、回复风格、LLM 和控制台页面设置。
zh.start.profile.label: 当前模式：
zh.start.offline.badge: 离线问答：只返回本地证据
zh.start.local.title: 本地模式
zh.start.local.desc: 不用 Docker，也不用先接 OpenMemory；先让 Markdown 和本地 SQLite 能搜到。
zh.start.evidence.title: 先查证据
zh.start.evidence.desc: 搜索能命中资料页以后，再让 AI 接入；这样问题更容易定位。
zh.start.dashboard.title: 打开控制台
zh.start.dashboard.desc: 网页里看运行状态、项目进展和待确认内容；高级页面继续留给熟悉流程后使用。
zh.start.next.title: 下一步去哪
zh.start.next.health_desc: 确认服务、缓存和资料库状态。
zh.start.next.quality_desc: 看分流和问答失败情况。
zh.start.next.agent_desc: 检查 IDE 是否接上 TigerMemory。
zh.start.boundary.title: 边界说明
zh.start.boundary.offline: 离线问答只读本地证据，不调用在线模型，也不写入长期 Wiki。
zh.start.boundary.review: 今日待确认用于人工审批，适合处理真正要进入 Wiki 或即时记忆的内容。
zh.start.boundary.optional: 高级服务未启动时，运行检查会把它们标为可选，不影响 basic/local 体验。
zh.page.health.intro: 运行检查约每 45 秒自动刷新；基础模式会把高级连接显示为可选。
zh.page.quality.intro: 看今天的待确认内容、记忆服务连接、回答速度和失败问题；未接入的低频指标不在常规视图里占位。
zh.page.settings.intro: 这些设置先保存在本机。勾选长期同步后，会生成提议再写入个人偏好页，控制台不会直接改敏感资料。
zh.page.canvas.intro: 读取 wiki/operations/project-canvas.md，默认展示可拖拽缩放的项目星图；Mermaid 原图保留在技术图中用于核对。
zh.page.self_evolution.intro: 只读查看 hook 证据、重复问题和安全提案；默认只提案，不自动改核心规则。
zh.page.canvas.active_modules_intro: 读取源文件中的活跃模块列表，仅用于快速了解当前推进状态。
zh.page.canvas.module_no_selection: 请先从右侧“活跃模块”点击任一模块查看。
zh.page.canvas.modules_empty: 暂无活跃模块摘要，请先更新画布。
zh.page.canvas.render_missing: 未读取到可用的 Mermaid 代码块。
zh.page.canvas.legend: 图例：绿色=已完成，黄色=进行中，灰色=待开工；蓝色高亮表示当前待处理模块。
zh.page.canvas.graph_hint: 拖拽空白处移动，滚轮缩放；点击节点查看详情。
zh.page.canvas.graph_center_hint: 围绕当前阶段展开，节点可点击下钻。
zh.page.canvas.graph_summary: {done} 已完成 / {active} 推进中 / {pending} 待开工
zh.page.canvas.empty_state: 暂未读取到 Mermaid 图。请确认源文件里有 Mermaid fenced block。
zh.service.tm-mcp.detail: 给 AI 调用的接口
zh.term.fetch_failed: 数据暂时没取到，请稍后重试
zh.term.head: HEAD
zh.status.clean: 资料库状态正常，可以继续操作。
zh.section.quality.status: 回答状态分布（近 7 天）
zh.section.settings.agents: 这些 AI 助手都适用
zh.section.settings.workflow: 不同 AI 怎么分工
zh.section.settings.json: 查看保存的设置明细（技术）
zh.action.confirm_wiki: 使用选中目标写入 Wiki
zh.help.archive: 归档：把这条收件箱条目移到归档区，日常审批列表不再显示。
zh.help.write_mem0: 即时记忆：适合近期偏好、反馈、还在变化的事实。
zh.help.write_wiki: Wiki：长期事实记忆库，适合稳定规则、流程、可长期引用的资料。
zh.help.discard_candidates: 待复检的丢弃项：被智能分流判为低价值忽略但可能值得人工二审。
zh.help.clear_selection: 清空当前多选，不改变任何收件箱文件。
zh.daily.archive.note: 这些收件箱已超过 14 天且没有应用记录。
zh.daily.processing.batch_mem0: 正在批量进入即时记忆中...
zh.daily.processing.batch_wiki: 正在批量写入 Wiki 中...
zh.daily.wiki.modal.title: 写入 Wiki 推荐
zh.daily.wiki.no_similar: 未找到明显相似页面，可以按默认推荐新建。
zh.daily.inbox.no_pending: 当前没有需要你处理的内容。
zh.daily.inbox.missing_title: 这条收件箱条目缺少中文标题
zh.daily.inbox.missing_title_hint: 缺少中文标题，建议回补 title_cn。
zh.self_evolution.empty.proposals: 暂未发现需要提案的重复问题。
zh.self_evolution.empty.samples: 暂无可展示的证据样本。
zh.daily.inbox.preview: 展开原文预览（约 200 字）
zh.daily.proposals.none: 今天没有 AI 修改建议
zh.quality.no_failures: 近 7 天未发现新的思考路径失败项。
zh.settings.depth.a.title: A 极简
zh.settings.depth.a.subtitle: 只给中文
zh.settings.depth.b.title: B 简短
zh.settings.depth.b.subtitle: + 类比
zh.settings.depth.c.title: C 工程
zh.settings.depth.c.subtitle: + 上下文
zh.settings.depth.c.example: OAuth（账号授权，tigermemory 用于连接器）
zh.settings.depth.d.title: D 全套
zh.settings.depth.d.subtitle: 三段都给
zh.settings.depth.d.example: 账号授权 + 类比 + 系统上下文
zh.settings.progressive.desc: 开启后，同一个词被解释过多次时，会自动少解释几遍，让页面更清爽。
zh.settings.progressive.note: 当前只保存开关；后续会补上每个词被解释过几次。
zh.settings.propose_wiki: 保存后提交长期 Wiki 提案
zh.settings.saving: 正在保存偏好并提交 wiki 提案...
zh.settings.reset_done: 已恢复默认值，尚未保存。
zh.settings.wiki_proposal_done: Wiki 提案已提交或未启用
zh.page.agent_tools.title: TigerMemory AI 连接
zh.agent.connection_desc: 自动检测本地 IDE 配置文件，帮助您了解 Claude Desktop 和 Cursor 是否已成功通过 MCP 连接到 tigermemory。
zh.agent.title: AI 连接与检查
zh.agent.desc: 本页检查 Claude / Cursor 是否连上 TigerMemory，并用真实查询看看搜索能不能找到资料。
zh.agent.wizard_footer: 📌 安全保障：第一阶段只开放只读状态监测，防止网页端覆盖写损坏您的原始 IDE 配置文件。如需连接，请使用已安装的 TigerMemory 命令。
zh.agent.doctor_desc: 检查资料库、本地服务、即时记忆和历史避坑记录，找出可能影响 AI 使用的问题。
zh.agent.doctor_footer_init: 点击体检后，这里会显示建议处理的问题。
zh.agent.eval_desc: 用本地测试题检查 Wiki 搜索和即时记忆是否能找到正确资料。
zh.agent.eval_wiki_r1_desc: 第一个结果就是正确资料
zh.agent.eval_wiki_r3_desc: 前三个结果里有正确资料
zh.agent.eval_wiki_latency_desc: 一次搜索平均要花多久
zh.agent.eval_mem0_desc: 近期事件检索能不能找到对的内容
zh.agent.exp1_desc: 意思是：AI 搜索出来的前几个结果里，有没有包含正确资料。
zh.agent.exp1_item1: 第 1 条命中：第一个结果就是正确资料，要求最严格；
zh.agent.exp1_item2: 前 3 条命中：正确资料出现在前三个结果里，日常已经很好用；
zh.agent.exp1_item3: 前 5 条命中：正确资料出现在前五个结果里。若为 0%，说明本地知识库索引可能失效。
zh.agent.exp2_desc: 指 AI 完成一次查询要花多长时间，单位是毫秒 (ms)。大致可以分三档：
zh.agent.exp2_item1: 100ms 以内：非常快，接近本地缓存体验；
zh.agent.exp2_item3: 500ms 以上：略慢，可能是服务繁忙、网络慢或模型响应慢。
zh.agent.cursor_not_found: 未检测到 Cursor 的配置文件 (mcp.json) 路径。
zh.agent.claude_not_found: 未检测到 Claude Desktop 的连接文件路径。
zh.agent.doctor_lessons_hit: 已为您拦截防御，命中 lessons 记录 {count} 个。
zh.agent.eval_sug_low: Wiki 优化建议：当前第一条命中率偏低。建议检查页面头信息，并补充常用别名，让搜索更容易找到正确资料。
zh.agent.eval_sug_med: Wiki 优化建议：第一条命中率中等。可以在页面开头补充常用同义词，进一步提高搜索稳定性。
zh.agent.eval_sug_high: Wiki 表现良好：第一条命中率很高，本地 Markdown 的别名和结构比较健康。

en.app.title: TigerMemory
en.brand.name: TigerMemory
en.brand.subtitle: Memory Operations
en.page.start.title: TigerMemory Start
en.page.daily.title: TigerMemory Daily Review
en.page.health.title: TigerMemory System Health
en.page.quality.title: TigerMemory Memory Quality
en.page.settings.title: TigerMemory Preferences
en.page.canvas.title: TigerMemory Project Progress
en.page.self_evolution.title: TigerMemory Self-Evolution
en.page.start.intro: Step through local mode, reply style, LLM setup, and the dashboard map.
en.start.profile.label: Current profile:
en.start.local.title: Local Mode
en.start.local.desc: No Docker and no OpenMemory needed first. Make Markdown and local SQLite searchable before adding services.
en.start.evidence.title: Check Evidence First
en.start.evidence.desc: Once search can find the right pages, connecting AI agents becomes easier to troubleshoot.
en.start.dashboard.title: Open Dashboard
en.start.dashboard.desc: Use the web console for runtime state, project progress, and pending review. Advanced pages stay available for later.
en.start.next.title: Where Next
en.start.next.health_desc: Check services, cache, and vault state.
en.start.next.agent_desc: Check whether IDE agents are connected.
en.start.boundary.title: Boundaries
en.start.boundary.offline: Offline ask reads local evidence only. It does not call an online model or write long-term Wiki pages.
en.start.boundary.review: Daily Review is for human approval when content should enter Wiki or short-term memory.
en.start.boundary.optional: If advanced services are not running, System Health marks them optional and basic/local use still works.
en.page.health.intro: Health checks refresh about every 45 seconds; basic mode marks advanced connections as optional.
en.page.quality.intro: Inspect pending review, memory connectivity, response speed, and failures. Low-frequency metrics stay out of the default view until they are wired.
en.page.settings.intro: Preferences are saved to the local database first. When long-term sync is enabled, they are proposed for private review; the dashboard never writes person pages directly.
en.page.canvas.intro: Read wiki/operations/project-canvas.md and show a draggable, zoomable project graph by default; the original Mermaid graph remains available in the technical view.
en.page.self_evolution.intro: Read-only view of hook evidence, repeated issues, and safe proposals. The default mode only proposes and does not change core rules.
en.page.canvas.active_modules_intro: Parse and list the active modules section from the source file for a quick state summary.
en.page.canvas.module_no_selection: Click any module card on the right to view details.
en.page.canvas.modules_empty: No active module summary is available yet. Update the canvas first.
en.page.canvas.render_missing: No usable Mermaid block was found.
en.page.canvas.roadmap_empty: No project stages were parsed yet.
en.page.canvas.legend: Legend: green = completed, yellow = in progress, gray = pending; blue highlight indicates current action items.
en.page.canvas.graph_hint: Drag empty space to move, use the wheel to zoom, and click any node for details.
en.page.canvas.graph_center_hint: Current stages spread around the center. Click nodes to drill down.
en.page.canvas.empty_state: No Mermaid diagram found yet. Please check wiki/operations/project-canvas.md for a Mermaid fenced block.
en.term.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch data. Try again later.
en.term.head: HEAD
en.help.archive: Archive: move this inbox item out of daily review.
en.help.write_mem0: Mem0: short-term memory for recent preferences, feedback, and changing facts.
en.help.write_wiki: Wiki: long-term facts for stable rules, workflows, and references.
en.help.discard_candidates: Discard candidates: low-value rejects that may still deserve a human review.
en.help.clear_selection: Clear the current selection without changing inbox files.
en.daily.archive.note: These inbox items are older than 14 days and have no applied record.
en.daily.wiki.modal.title: Wiki Target Recommendation
en.daily.wiki.no_similar: No clear similar page found. Use the default target to create a new page.
en.daily.inbox.no_pending: No pending inbox items in today's decision area.
en.daily.inbox.missing_title: This inbox item has no Chinese title
en.daily.reject_default: Rejected manually in the review UI
en.quality.no_failures: No new trace failures in the last 7 days.
en.settings.depth.a.title: A Minimal
en.settings.depth.a.subtitle: Chinese only
en.settings.depth.b.title: B Short
en.settings.depth.b.subtitle: + analogy
en.settings.depth.b.example: OAuth (account authorization, like an ID card)
en.settings.depth.c.title: C Engineering
en.settings.depth.c.subtitle: + context
en.settings.depth.c.example: OAuth (account authorization, used by tigermemory connectors)
en.settings.depth.d.title: D Full
en.settings.depth.d.subtitle: all three parts
en.settings.progressive.desc: After repeated explanations, a term graduates automatically and stops being explained every time.
en.settings.progressive.note: v1 saves the switch only; the term_annotation_counter panel will be connected later.
en.settings.propose_wiki: Submit a long-term Wiki proposal after saving
en.settings.saving: Saving preferences and submitting wiki proposal...
en.settings.reset_done: Defaults restored but not saved yet.
en.settings.wiki_proposal_done: Wiki proposal submitted or not enabled
en.page.agent_tools.title: TigerMemory Agent Access
en.agent.connection_desc: Automatically detect local IDE configuration files to help you understand if Claude Desktop and Cursor have successfully connected to TigerMemory via MCP.
en.agent.title: Agent Integration & Doctor
en.agent.desc: This page manages connections to your Claude / Cursor, runs one-click health diagnosis, and utilizes Recall@K algorithm to evaluate retrieval recall rate and latency.
en.agent.wizard_footer: 📌 Security Safeguard: The first stage only supports read-only status monitoring to prevent web writes from corrupting your original IDE configurations. To connect, use the installed TigerMemory command.
en.agent.doctor_desc: Scan local worktree cleanliness, local services, short-term memory engine, and lessons learned avoidance to locate potential risks.
en.agent.doctor_footer_init: 🚦 Expert tuning advice will be automatically rendered here after clicking the health check button.
en.agent.eval_desc: Evaluate Wiki search accuracy and Mem0 latency based on local static cases in data/eval_suites.json.
en.agent.exp1_desc: The mathematical probability that the correct answer is included in the top K returned search results.
en.agent.exp1_item1: Recall@1: Probability of picking the correct answer at first glance, extremely rigorous but most critical;
en.agent.exp1_item2: Recall@3: Allows the correct answer to be in the top 3, excellent for long-form outline recall;
en.agent.exp1_item3: Recall@5: Allows in top 5. If 0%, it indicates severe failure in local knowledge base indexing.
en.agent.exp2_desc: The amount of time (in milliseconds) it takes for AI to perform a single query. Latency is categorized into three levels:
en.agent.exp2_item1: Under 100ms: Lightning-fast response, local-cache-like experience, smooth and fluid;
en.agent.exp2_item2: 100ms ~ 500ms: Acceptably smooth, suitable for regular personal cloud brain processing;
en.agent.exp2_item3: Above 500ms: Slightly sluggish, indicating high network load or high LLM latency.
en.agent.cursor_not_found: Cursor configuration file (mcp.json) path not detected.
en.agent.claude_not_found: Claude Desktop connection file path not detected.
en.agent.eval_sug_low: 📌 [Wiki Optimization Advice]: Current Recall@1 precision is low (below 60%). We recommend checking page frontmatter and enriching aliases: [alias1, alias2] configurations to improve search localization.
en.agent.eval_sug_med: 📌 [Wiki Optimization Advice]: Recall@1 is at a medium level (60% ~ 80%). You can perform minor search tuning by adding common synonyms in the introductory paragraphs.
en.agent.eval_sug_high: 📌 [Wiki Performance Excellent]: Top-1 recall precision is outstanding (above 80%). The local Markdown alias strategy and structure are extremely healthy! Keep it up.
